_shorthelp: GridRow Sets up a row on your form which you can add GridColumns to. Bootstrap.

_gutters.desc: Should there be space between columns?

_rowClass.desc: Classes to apply to each row

_verticalAlign.desc: How should the columns be aligned in the row?

_csstemplate: #{id} {{{if _parent.position<>'static'}position:{_parent.position};{/if}{if display<>''} display:{display};{/if}{if left<>'' and left<>'auto'} left:{left!p};{/if}{if right<>'' and right<>'auto'} right:{right!p};{/if}{if top<>'' and top<>'auto'} top:{top!p};{/if}{if bottom<>'' and bottom<>'auto'} bottom:{bottom!p};{/if}{if height<>'' and height<>'auto'} height:{height!p};{/if}{if width<>'' and width<>'auto'} width:{width!p};{/if}}}
